title: Savory Juicy Romantic Canadian Cream Cheese Stir-fry
description: A savory and juicy vegetarian-friendly dish featuring creamy Canadian cream cheese in a quick stir-fry that's perfect for any mealtime.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: Includes bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, and broccoli

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and ginger paste, stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add mixed vegetables to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until they start to soften and slightly golden.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with water. Pour into the wok, stirring constantly to prevent lumps from forming and to thicken the sauce.
Reduce heat to low-medium and add Canadian cream cheese, allowing it to melt slowly into the sauce. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until heated through and the sauce is glossy and creamy.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
